name: Image
description: Standalone image block on a tinted background — single image with alt text, no copy. Use when: inline illustration, screenshot, or visual break between text sections. Skip when: image with text/buttons (use `call-to-action-with-image`), multiple images (use `slider` or `features`), or a hero heading (use `title`). `image` is the image URL — leave empty if the user did not supply one. `alttext` is the `alt` attribute — generate a brief description from page context for accessibility/SEO.
